name: Seishin - Virtual Rhythm
short_description: Seishin is a virtual reality rhythm game where the goal is to hit targets the beat of the music. Use your pair of magical drumsticks to hit targets, follow sliders and spin spinners. A strong combination of timing and precision is key to achieving success.
detailed_description:
Update Notes

Update 3/27/18:

  • Fixed a bug where single channel songs would play at double the normal speed
Update 3/5/18:
  • Fixed a bug where certain beatmaps wouldn't load properly


About the Game

Seishin is a virtual reality rhythm game where the goal is to hit targets the beat of the music. Use your pair of magical drumsticks to hit targets, follow sliders and spin spinners. A strong combination of timing and precision is key to achieving success.

Beatmaps

Each song contains hand-crafted beatmaps at various difficulties, ensuring a variety of distinct patterns and unique challenges. Import your existing beatmap collection. Browse and download new tracks within the game.

Leaderboards

Track your personal progress or compete against others via local and online leaderboards.

Mods

Choose from a variety of mods to create a more hardcore or casual experience to your liking.
